name: obsidian-crate
description: Crate plugin - Sync your vault to Cloudflare R2

scripts.deploy: if [ -z "$OBSIDIAN_VAULT" ]; then echo 'Error: OBSIDIAN_VAULT env var is not set. Export it to your vault path.'; exit 1; fi && npm run build && mkdir -p "$OBSIDIAN_VAULT/.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-crate" && cp main.js manifest.json styles.css "$OBSIDIAN_VAULT/.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-crate/"
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
